title: PGIMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Associate II Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has released an official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Project Associate II Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in B.Sc, M.Sc, B.V.Sc, and B.Pharm can apply for the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 . Here we include the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
